prompt_en: Cinematic Korean apocalypse opening for CH15 격리 파수. radio mast, cold storage, sea fog, archival realism, delayed guilt. Location mood: 절벽 검문선, 파수 막사, 브레이커 타워. Show route pressure, practical survival gear, and incoming threat 파수 사령체. Grounded realism, no fantasy.
prompt_ko_context: 검문선을 열고 안보경의 빈자리를 남긴 채 앞으로 밀려난다.
camera_notes: wider negative space, slower pans, distance before impact. Start wide, move into corridor pressure, end on route decision beat.
audio_notes: Base cue echo_base. Layer alarm pulses, crowd pressure ambience, and metallic reverb.
